CONNECT YOUR NEWSLETTER
WITH THE TOOLS YOU LOVE
Seamless integrations with analytics, e-commerce, and automation platforms.
Sign up for free
Effortlessly connect with Stripe, Zapier, Google Analytics, and more.
Enhance your workflow with AI-powered recommendations and segmentation.
Sync your subscribers with CRM and marketing automation platforms.
GOT QUESTIONS?
WE'VE GOT ANSWERS.
What makes us the best newsletter platform?
beehiiv combines powerful newsletter features, a no-code website builder, advanced analytics, and the industry's largest native ad network in one platform. Its ease of use, combined with a full suite of growth and monetization features, makes it the best newsletter platform for creators and brands of any size.
Can I integrate my existing email list from another newsletter platform?
Yes, you can import subscribers from other platforms in just minutes. Check out our
migration resources here
.
Does beehiiv support selling digital products?
Absolutely. Our newsletter platform lets you monetize your content directly by selling digital products and paid subscriptions, without needing any additional tools or software.
Can I create a newsletter without prior design experience?
Yes. Our platform includes drag-and-drop templates and intuitive editing tools, making it one of the best publishing platforms for beginners and pros alike.
Can I send SMS messages from beehiiv?
beehiiv is an email-focused publishing platform. You cannot send SMS natively, but you can connect to third-party services via our API or webhooks to send messages in response to events or triggers from your beehiiv account.
Is beehiiv suitable for small businesses?
Absolutely. Its user-friendly interface, drag-and-drop editor, and pre-built templates make it easy for small businesses to send professional email newsletters without writing a single line of code.
Can I track the performance of my newsletters?
Of course. beehiiv provides in-depth analytics to track performance and engagement for your newsletter and website, helping you grow your audience over time.
Can you try it for free first, then upgrade later?
Yes! The Launch plan offers a free entry point to the beehiiv ecosystem, providing the essential features you need to get started. As your subscriber list grows and you need more advanced growth and monetization features, you can upgrade to our Scale or Max plans.
READY TO Build?
Own your audience today
Sign up for free
Trial Premium Features

newsletter, mailing list, brand, marketing strategy, customer, accessibility, email marketing, email address, attention, drag and drop, personalization, create newsletters, email newsletter, email list, sending email newsletters, email marketing platforms, newsletter marketing, newsletter mail, newsletter b2b, service newsletter, newsletter web, newsletter e mail, graphics, landing page, brand awareness, open rate, return on investment, button, infographic, testimonial, automation, loyalty, social media, mobile device, call to action, graphic design, nonprofit organization, content marketing, copywriting, email marketing strategy, marketing email newsletter, newsletter template, newsletter email, email newsletter design, newsletter design, email templates, newsletter ideas, newsletter content, newsletter templates, free email templates, newsletter site, newsletter hotel, fundraising, customer engagement, broadcasting, mass, mass media, literacy, mental health, media literacy, telecommunications, television, digital media, fake news, closed captioning, culture, mass communication, mergers and acquisitions, cable television, concentration of media ownership, publishing, behavior, rss, knowledge, journalism, violence, subtitles, radio broadcasting, web marketing, media bias, digital television, license, entertainment, society, new york city, latin, satellite television, digital radio, billboard, research, organization, satellite, misinformation, wireless, law, bias, data compression, policy, ownership, broadcast license, stereotype, perception, universe, political polarization, drama, desire, narrative, news media, department, mass media media, digital content, media print, traversy media, media, landscape, understanding, creator, creators, creator logo, logo online creator, creator logo free, banner youtube creator, creator logo online, logo online creator free, creator adobe, logo 3d creator, creator banner, creator economy
Frequently Asked Questions
Are newsletters considered a form of media?
Newsletters are indeed considered a form of media. They serve as a medium for sharing information, engaging with audiences, and distributing content, much like other traditional and digital media outlets.
How do creators use newsletters effectively?
Creators use newsletters effectively by consistently delivering engaging content, building authentic connections with their audience, utilizing growth strategies to expand their subscriber list, and leveraging monetization options to generate revenue from their newsletters.
What impact do social media algorithms have on content creators?
Social media algorithms significantly influence content creators by determining the visibility and reach of their posts. These algorithms prioritize certain types of content, affecting engagement and ultimately impacting growth and monetization opportunities for creators.
How can creators leverage media to enhance their newsletter content?
Creators can leverage media to enhance their newsletter content by incorporating visuals, audio, and video elements that engage readers and complement the text, ultimately enriching the storytelling experience and attracting a wider audience.
Are newsletters an effective tool for creators to engage with their audience?
Newsletters are an effective tool for creators to engage with their audience. They provide a direct, personalized channel for communication, fostering stronger connections and encouraging ongoing interaction with subscribers.
How can newsletters boost media exposure?
Newsletters can significantly boost media exposure by directly engaging and expanding audiences through targeted content delivery, enhancing brand visibility, and fostering relationships that encourage sharing across platforms.
What strategies do creators use in newsletters?
Creators use various strategies in newsletters, including segmenting their audience for targeted content, creating engaging and valuable material, utilizing strong calls-to-action, and incorporating analytics to refine their approach for better engagement and monetization.
Can social media expand newsletter reach?
Social media can significantly expand newsletter reach by effectively promoting content, engaging audiences, and driving traffic to subscription links. Leveraging social platforms allows creators to tap into wider demographics and attract new subscribers.
Do creators prefer media or newsletters?
Creators often prefer newsletters over other media formats due to their potential for direct engagement, personalized communication, and the ability to effectively monetize their content. Newsletters allow creators to build c

Grow faster. Earn more. Pay less.
Get started for free
From newsletters and podcasts to websites and digital products, beehiiv supports every aspect of your business.
Scale faster with audience growth tools like recommendations and referral programs built directly into the platform.
Turn attention into revenue with paid subscriptions, paid recommendations, and the industry’s largest native ad network.
“
We launched on beehiiv with nothing, scaled to over 250,000 subscribers, and got acquired all in under a year. beehiiv is that powerful.
”
Shaan Puri
Founder of Milk Road
Frequently Asked Questions
Is beehiiv free to use?
Yes. beehiiv's Launch plan is free, forever, with no credit card required. You get up to 2,500 subscribers, unlimited email sends, and access to beehiiv's core newsletter, website, and podcast tools. When you're ready to unlock monetization, advanced analytics, AI tools, and more, paid plans start at $49/month.
What is the difference between beehiiv Scale and beehiiv Max plans?
Both plans include unlimited email sends, automations, the beehiiv Ad Network, paid subscription tools, digital products, and advanced analytics. Max adds several key upgrades: the ability to remove beehiiv branding from your newsletter and website, dynamic content, priority support, and up to 10 publications per account (vs. 3 on Scale). If a white-label experience, advanced features, and faster support matter to your operation, Max is the step up worth taking.
Does beehiiv take a cut of paid newsletter revenue?
No. beehiiv takes 0% of your paid subscription revenue. You keep everything you earn, minus Stripe's standard processing fee of 2.9% + $0.30 per transaction. Compare that to platforms like Substack, which takes 10% off the top of every subscription.
Does beehiiv charge extra for email sends?
No. All beehiiv plans, including the free Launch plan, include unlimited email sends. You're never penalized for sending more frequently or for emailing your full list.

beehiiv’s Link in Bio
, fully integrated into your website and content.
View in Platform →
View the Tutorial →
View the Announcement →
Share Link
Dynamic Content
Dynamic Content
Now, you can personalize your emails like never before by showing different content to different readers, all within a single send.
View in Platform →
View the Announcement →
Share Link
September - 2025
Discord Integration
Discord Integration
Starting today, beehiiv’s new native Discord integration makes it easy to create a private community for your subscribers.
View in Platform →
View the Announcement →
Share Link
YouTube Integration
YouTube Integration
Many of you already have both an audience
and
a library of videos on YouTube, and we’re making it simple to bring that content into beehiiv.
View in Platform →
View the Tutorial →
View the Announcement →
Share Link
Website Redirects
Website Redirects
With our new dynamic redirect feature, you can create unlimited custom redirects in seconds. It’s intuitive, supports wildcard patterns, and even includes a built-in testing tool so you can be confident everything works exactly as expected.
View in Platform →
View the Announcement →
Share Link
All-new beehiiv Ad Network
All-new beehiiv Ad Network
Already home to hundreds of premium advertisers and thousands of top newsletters, the Ad Network has been completely redesigned to make monetization easier, faster, and more rewarding than ever.
View in Platform →
View the Announcement →
Share Link
August - 2025
New Dashboard Experience
New Dashboard Experience
Meet the all-new beehiiv dashboard: your home base for newsletter insights and analysis.
View in Platform →
View the Announcement →
Share Link
Subscriber Center
Subscriber Center
It's a simple, intuitive home base where readers can manage all their settings and preferences.
View the Announcement →
Share Link
Reader Retention Suite
Reader Retention Suite
A powerful suite of tools built to stop paid subscriber churn in its tracks.
View in Platform →
View the Documentation →
View the Announcement →
Share Link
July - 2025
Website Builder Stable Launch
Website Builder Stable Launch
It’s a big day for us at beehiiv: our new Website Builder is officially out of beta and available to
all
users on
all
plans.
View in Platform →
View the Documentation →
View the Announcement →
Share Link
June - 2025
The Top 4
The Top 4
We've completely redesigned our Recommendations engine, making it easier than ever to share meaningful endorsements — and get discovered in return.
View in Platform →
View the Documentation →
View the Announcement →
Share Link
Website Builder V2 Available On All Paid Plans
Website Builder V2 Available On All Paid Plans
We launched our new Website Builder to empower our customers with the tools to build stunning, high-performing websites as easily as possible. Today, we rolled out the Beta across all of our paid plans.
View in Platform →
View the Announcement →
Share Link
Upgraded Subscribe Forms
Upgraded Subscribe Forms
These new subscribe forms are our most flexible, customizable, and data-rich forms yet — built from the ground up to help you grow faster.
View in Platform →
View the Documentation →
View the Announcement →
Share Link
Smarter Social Sharing
Smarter Social Sharing
And with our new
AI Social Helper
, you can instantly generate posts tailored to each platform — optimized for performance and written in your unique voice
View in Platform →
View the Documentation →
View the Announcement →
Share Link
Multiple Sending Domains
Multiple Sending Domains
Whether you're managing multiple newsletters or collaborating across teams, sending from more than one domain unlocks a world of new possibilities.
View in Platform →
View the Announcement →
Share Link
Expert Directory
Expert Directory
Need an extra hand with your newsletter? Our new Expert Directory connects you with trusted pros who specialize in design, growth, strategy, migrations, and more.
View in Platform →
View the Announcement →
Share Link
May - 2025
Partner Vision
Partner Vision
Now you can see the name, email, and payment status of every lead in your pipeline, making it easier than ever to manage and nurture your referrals. That nurturing pays off, too. One of our partners made over
$10,000
with just a single referral last month
View in Platform →
View the Documentation →
View the Announcement →
Share Link
Card Editor
Card Editor
A powerful new tool that lets you fine-tune every detail of your site’s design, down to the last pixel.
View in Platform →
View the Tutorial →
View the Announcement →
Share Link
Post Template Library Update
Post Template Library Update
The post template library now features a dozen professionally designed templates, ready for your next newsletter edition.
View in Platform →
View the Documentation →
View the Announcement →
Share Link
Podcast Voice Cloning
Podcast Voice Cloning
We’re launching our most requested feature: voice cloning. Now, your newsletter can be narrated in your own voice — no studio setup or editing software required.
View in Platform →
View the Documentation →
View the Announcement →
Share Link
Automation Templates
Automation Templates
We’ve condensed hundreds of high-impact newsletter automations into a library of ready-to-use templates. Now, you can harness the same automations used by the largest newsletters in the industry to grow, engage, and retain your own audience.
View in Platform →
View the Documentation →
View the Announcement →
Share Link
Smarter Segments & Custom Fields
Smarter Segments & Custom Fields
We’ve made major upgrades to the custom field builder so you can quickly add common fields or create your own from scratch. We also revamped our segmentation builder to be faster and more dynamic based on the type of data you’re using.
View in Platform →
View the Documentation →
View the Announcement →
Share Link
Website Builder Onboarding
Website Builder Onboarding
Our new Website Builder unlocks a ton of new possibilities, and it’s now easier than ever to start exploring them. Our new onboarding experience is designed to get you from beginner to “oh my god that’s beautiful” in five simple steps.
View in Platform →
View the Documentation →
View the Announcement →
Share Link
Podcast Updates
Podcast Updates
Since launching the feature a few weeks ago, we’ve added a bunch of updates and enhancements based on your feedback: dozens of new and improved voices, custom script editing, AI-powered cover art.
View in Platform →
View the Documentation →
View the Announcement →

April - 2025
Podcasts
Podcasts

View the Announcement →

Content Gates

Content Gates

Start with the outcome.
No matter what you're trying to do, there's an integration (or two) for that.
Grow Your Audience
Connect forms, e-commerce tools, and acquisition channels to turn traffic into subscribers.
Monetize Your Newsletter
Accept payments, sell subscriptions, and grow revenue without leaving beehiiv.
Automate Your Workflow
Reduce manual work and connect your systems so your newsletter runs while you write.
Measure Performance
Track engagement, growth, and revenue. Know which issues move the needle.
Get started in just minutes.
1
.
Choose your integration.
2
.
Connect your account.
3
.
Automate your workflow.
4
.
Everything runs through beehiiv.
Frequently asked questions
What tools does beehiiv integrate with?
beehiiv natively integrates with tools across ecommerce, payments, CRM, analytics, automation, forms, and more. Through Zapier, you can connect to thousands of additional apps.
Can I connect tools not listed here?
Yes. Use Zapier or Make to connect thousands of apps to beehiiv, or use the beehiiv API and webhooks to build workflows for tools that are not listed on this page.
Do I need a developer to set up integrations?
Most integrations connect in a few clicks from your beehiiv dashboard — no code required. If you need a custom workflow with the API or webhooks, a developer can help, but many teams set those up without engineering support.
Does beehiiv integrate with Stripe?
Yes. Connect Stripe to accept payments, sell paid subscriptions, and manage revenue directly through beehiiv.
Does beehiiv integrate with Shopify?
Yes. beehiiv supports Shopify integrations for content ingestion, ecommerce workflows, and connecting your store to your newsletter.
Does beehiiv integrate with Zapier?
Yes. beehiiv connects to thousands of apps through Zapier, so you can automate subscriber sync, content workflows, CRM updates, and more without writing code.
Can I build custom integrations?
Yes. Use the beehiiv API, Send API, and webhooks to build custom integrations for your stack. Full documentation is available at developers.beehiiv.com.
Trial Premium Features
The one place to build.

analysis.name: beehiiv
analysis.value_proposition: All-in-one platform combining newsletters, websites, podcasts, and monetization tools for creators and publishers to grow and earn.
analysis.ideal_customer: Independent journalists, newsletter creators, publishers, newsrooms, and media brands looking to build, grow, and monetize newsletter-first businesses

features.name: newsletter builder
features.description: Drag-and-drop newsletter editor with design and styling capabilities
features.evidence_quote: Our newsletter builder lets you seamlessly design and style your newsletter as you write

features.name: website builder
features.evidence_quote: Our no-code website builder can give you a world-class website in minutes

features.name: ai website builder
features.description: Build a fully interactive website by chatting with AI
features.evidence_quote: you can build a fully interactive website just by chatting with AI

features.name: podcast hosting
features.description: Native podcast launch, hosting and monetization
features.evidence_quote: You can now launch, host, and monetize your podcast entirely on beehiiv

features.name: ad network
features.description: Built-in ad network connecting content with global brands
features.evidence_quote: Our built-in ad network does the selling for you, connecting your content with global brands

features.name: on-demand ads
features.description: Ad opportunities refresh every hour inside editor
features.evidence_quote: Available opportunities now refresh every hour, giving you constant access to the best sponsors

features.name: boosts network
features.description: Paid recommendations network for audience growth

features.name: referral program
features.description: Built-in referral program for subscriber acquisition

features.description: Sell digital products directly through beehiiv
features.evidence_quote: You can now sell Digital Products directly on beehiiv

features.evidence_quote: Host live events for up to 10,000 attendees, sell tickets in 10 currencies

features.name: ai credits

features.name: automations
features.description: Email automation workflows with triggers, testing and analytics
features.evidence_quote: More triggers. Built-in testing. Smarter analytics. True end-to-end visibility

features.name: magic links
features.description: Passwordless login and access via magic links

features.name: website analytics

features.name: dynamic content
features.description: Personalize a single newsletter for every reader

features.name: ai bot control
features.description: Control AI bot access to content

features.name: media library

free_tier.limits: Up to 2,500 subscribers, 1 team seat, 3 publications, unlimited sends, 10 AI credits/day

tiers.name: Launch
tiers.headline_inclusions: Newsletters/Website/Podcast, unlimited sends, custom domains, API (no Send API), MCP read

tiers.name: Scale
tiers.headline_inclusions: Ad Network, Boosts, 0% take rate paid subs, automations, surveys, webhooks, MCP write, 3 seats

tiers.name: Max
tiers.headline_inclusions: Remove branding, sponsorship storefront, audio, 10 publications, unlimited seats, dynamic content

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Concierge onboarding, dedicated AM, dedicated IPs, Send API, SSO, custom publication limits

pricing.notes: Pricing scales with subscriber count (1K/2.5K/5K/10K/25K/50K/75K/100K tiers). Starting prices shown are for lowest subscriber band. 100K+ subscribers requires Enterprise contact-sales. Annual billing offers ~12% discount ($71/yr off Scale, $157/yr off Max).
